description: Served as an active Student Council Member at SMA N 14 Semarang, where I contributed to planning and executing various school-wide events and student programs. This role allowed me to develop essential soft skills, including teamwork, public communication, and cross-functional coordination between students and faculty. Balancing these organizational responsibilities with a demanding Mathematics and Science curriculum sharpened my time management and analytical problem-solving abilities, which now support my engineering mindset.
